scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bunx vite build
scripts.e2e:teacher: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.teacher.config.ts
scripts.e2e:teacher:headed: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.teacher.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:assistant: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.assistant.config.ts
scripts.e2e:assistant:headed: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.assistant.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:admin: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.admin.config.ts
scripts.e2e:admin:headed: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.admin.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:shiyan: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.shiyan.config.ts
scripts.e2e:shiyan:headed: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.shiyan.config.ts --headed
scripts.e2e:all: bun run e2e:gen && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.teacher.config.ts && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.assistant.config.ts && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.admin.config.ts && bunx playwright test --config=playwright.shiyan.config.ts
